Thanks for applying to the Quantova Grants Program!
- New application? Make sure you copied applications/application-template.md to a NEW
  file applications/your_project_name.md and did not edit the template itself.
- Delivering a milestone? See docs/milestone-delivery.md.
Questions: Grants@quantova.org
-->

## Type of submission

- [ ] New grant application
- [ ] Amendment to an existing application
- [ ] RFP suggestion
- [ ] Milestone delivery

## Project name

<!-- the name of your project -->

## Checklist (for applications)

- [ ] I created a new file in `applications/` named after my project
- [ ] I did not modify `application-template.md`
- [ ] I filled in all mandatory sections, including relation to Quantova and a
      milestone-based roadmap
- [ ] I provided a QTOV payment address
- [ ] I agree to follow the [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
